title: stachys albicaulis
intro: Stachys albicaulis, also known as pink hedge nettle or white flowered hedge nettle, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The health benefits of Stachys albicaulis include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in salves and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
